caption:
Official collaboration of HIPSTRIKE & SONIC 2026 ⚡️

Where performance meets lifestyle.
Blending the energy of the run with everyday expression — from high-performance runner wear to versatile merchandise, each piece is designed to move with you, on and off the track.

Are you ready for a movement that goes beyond the run?

Sonic 2026 is a unique fusion of fitness and entertainment, combining a 5-kilometre fun run with a live music concert at Multimedia University. This exciting event invites runners, music lovers, and animal welfare supporters to participate in an evening run followed by an electrifying concert experience.

#customjerseyprinting #runningjersey #runningeventmalaysia #stravarunning #hipstrike

[APPRECIATION POST FOR LUMINARIA 2025]

Dear all,

Luminaria 2025 was successfully held on 29 November 2025 (Saturday) at Dataran Permata, MMU Melaka. Luminaria 2025 is conceived as a transformative evening dedicated to honouring the spirit of resilience against cancer. This event is in collaboration with National Cancer Society of Malaysia, MMUSIC Society and Golden Key Society.

By bringing together students, staff, survivors, and the broader community, Luminaria 2025 aims to create a powerful wave of solidarity, transforming our campus into a sanctuary of compassion and support for cancer patients and their families

Thank you!

”Speed Beyond Limits“

MMU RoadRunners Club 2024/2025

Not just made for the run — but made for your everyday moments.

Soft, easy, and effortless to wear, the Merchandise Series is designed for daily comfort without losing its edge in style.

From slow mornings to late nights, this is the piece you’ll keep reaching for.

Make sure to grab yours!

#hipstrike #customjersey #runningjersey #bajurunning #runningevent

[APPRECIATION POST FOR RELAY FOR LIFE 2025]

Dear all,

The Relay for Life 2025 was successfully held on 23 November 2025 (Sunday) at Taman Tasik Titiwangsa. Relay for Life is National Cancer Society of Malaysia (NCSM) flagship fundraising and awareness event, symbolising the relentless fight against cancer. 

This initiative aligns with our commitment to community engagement, holistic student development, and social responsibility. The objectives of this event are to raise a target fund for the care and support service for B40 cancer patients and to elevate public awareness about cancer prevention and early detection. 

Over 2,000 people took part in the run, including 43 students from MMU Melaka. This partnership between the MMU RoadRunners club and the National Cancer Society of Malaysia marks a significant step in mobilizing youth participation for a major health cause, demonstrating how institutional commitment can translate into tangible community impact.

Thank you!

[APPRECIATION POST FOR RUN FOR PAWS 2025]

Dear all,

Run for Paws 2025 was successfully held from 10 November 2025 (Monday) to 12 November 2025 (Wednesday). We visited the Pertubuhan Pencinta Hidupan Melaka on 22 November 2025 (Sunday) to pass them the food supplies, care supplies and monetary donation. 

It is with great pleasure that we announce a direct donation of RM 1,000.00 to Pertubuhan Pencinta Hidupan Melaka, supporting their invaluable work. Furthermore, thanks to the generosity of our sponsor, we have provided RM 500.00 worth of essential food supplies and an additional RM 150.00 worth of care supplies for our beloved fur animals.

Our deepest gratitude to every participant, committees, and sponsor who made this possible. Your commitment fuels our mission.

Thank you!

[RUN FOR PAWS 2025 - VIRTUAL RUN]

Dear all,

MMU RoadRunners Club is proud to announce Run For Paws 2025, a virtual charity run dedicated to supporting animal welfare. This significant initiative is organised in collaboration with Pertubuhan Pencinta Hidupan Melaka (PPHM) and Pertubuhan Kebajikan Jasa Bakti Malaysia (BETTER.MY) and MMUSIC Charity Carnival.

The primary objective is to rally the community to run a combined total of 500 kilometres, in order to raise RM 1000.00 for PPHM. For every kilometre logged by participants, RM 2.00 will be donated to PPHM to support their invaluable work in rescuing, sheltering and caring for animals in need.

Stay tuned for the full launch announcement of our event details. Get ready to lace up your running shoes and help us turn distance into donations!

Thank you!

Dear all,

We are pleased to announce that registration for the RRC Project 100 is now officially open. RRC Project 100 is a virtual run that invites participants to accumulate a total of 100 kilometres through running at their own pace between 1 September 2025 (Monday) to 31 October 2025 (Friday).

Attractive cash prizes await the top achievers:
- Champion: RM 200.00
- 1st Runner-Up: RM 150.00
- 2nd Runner-Up: RM 100.00

Registration and Inclusions:
- Fee: RM 12.00
- All participants receive: An e-certificate (minimum 10 km) and a medal (minimum 30 km).

*Please note that a separate delivery fee of RM 10.00 will be charged for the shipment of the medal (Melaka area only) to all eligible participants who are unable to collect the medal physically at the Multimedia University Melaka Campus.

[ROADRUNNERS CLUB - PARTICIPANTS RECRUITMENT FOR NĀRAKA]

Greetings from RoadRunners Club!

This event is a camp, which aims to offer a comprehensive approach to leadership development by incorporating theoretical knowledge with practical experiences, encouraging personal growth and preparing students for leadership roles in a variety of aspects of life.

Event Details:
Date: 18 January 2025 (Saturday)
Venue: MMU Melaka
Registration Fee: RM 35.00/person
Registration Deadline: 15 January 2025 (Wednesday), 11.59 PM

Registration Form: https://forms.gle/17HS6cUgtrgNsjkD7

Terms and Conditions:
1. Since the seats are very limited, registration is on a first-come, first-serve basis.
2. There will be no refund after payment has been made.
3. We reserve the right to change the details of this event.

[AMBASSADOR VIDEO FOR LUMINARIA 2025 - TAY YI]

Dear all, 

It is with great excitement that we introduce Tay Yi as the official ambassador of Luminaria 2025.

Luminaria 2025 is a transformative evening dedicated to honouring the spirit of resilience against cancer. More than just an event, it is a solemn gathering to remember those we have lost, to actively care for those currently battling the disease, and to collectively give blessings for strength and recovery.
